query:
UPDATE leases
            SET
                client_id = $4, leased = $5, expires_at = $6, probation = FALSE
            WHERE ip in
               (
                   SELECT ip
                    FROM leases
                    WHERE
                        ((expires_at < $1) AND (ip >= $2 AND ip <= $3)) OR (client_id = $4)
                    ORDER BY ip LIMIT 1
                )
            RETURNING ip
